# Controller API Checklist: 008 — Controller Bridge Endpoints

**Purpose**: Formal release-gate quality checks for requirements across controller endpoints and adjacent slide endpoints
**Created**: 2026-05-31
**Feature**: `specs/008-controller-bridge-endpoints/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are requirement statements defined for both controller endpoints and their adjacent slide endpoint boundaries (`/api/slides/status`, `/api/slides/view`) where integration assumptions exist? [Completeness, Spec FR-001, FR-003, Plan Summary]
- [x] CHK002 Are required response fields fully enumerated for manifest and navigation success payloads without relying on implicit assumptions? [Completeness, Spec FR-002, FR-006]
- [x] CHK003 Are all required error classes documented for both endpoints (`INVALID_REQUEST`, `UNAUTHORIZED`, `PRESENTATION_NOT_FOUND`, `INDEX_CONFLICT`, `SLIDE_STATE_UNAVAILABLE`)? [Completeness, Spec FR-010, Contracts]
- [x] CHK004 Are optional notes requirements explicitly defined for both present and absent states across manifest and navigation payloads? [Completeness, Spec FR-007, SC-005]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK005 Are response obligations phrased with concrete status codes and error names instead of broad terms like non-200? [Clarity, Spec User Story 1 Scenario 2]
- [x] CHK006 Is optimistic conflict behavior for `fromIndex` defined with unambiguous preconditions and non-mutation outcome language? [Clarity, Spec FR-004, FR-010]
- [x] CHK007 Are security constraints specific about prohibited disclosures (tokens, secrets, sensitive paths) in both responses and logs? [Clarity, Spec FR-011]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK008 Are endpoint paths, methods, and payload fields consistent between spec, plan, tasks, and OpenAPI contract? [Consistency, Spec FR-001 to FR-006, Plan Project Structure, Tasks Phase 2]
- [x] CHK009 Are naming conventions for entities and fields (`ControllerManifest`, `ControllerNavigationRequest`, `activeSlideIndex`) consistent across all artifacts? [Consistency, Spec Key Entities, Data Model]
- [x] CHK010 Are adjacent slide endpoint assumptions consistent with controller endpoint scope and free of hidden coupling requirements? [Consistency, Plan Summary, Tasks Scope]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK011 Are success criteria objectively measurable with explicit pass/fail thresholds and not subjective phrasing? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec SC-001 to SC-005]
- [x] CHK012 Do acceptance criteria map to planned validation tasks for security, determinism, notes compatibility, and performance? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec SC-001 to SC-005, Tasks T029-T034]
- [x] CHK013 Is the performance acceptance criterion defined with measurable protocol details (fixture size, run count, p95 calculation method)? [Measurability, Plan Performance Goals, Tasks T034, Gap]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK014 Are primary scenarios complete for bootstrap manifest retrieval and next/previous navigation mutation flows? [Coverage, User Stories 1-2]
- [x] CHK015 Are unauthorized and structured-failure scenarios complete and aligned with observability expectations? [Coverage, User Story 3, Spec FR-009, FR-010]
- [x] CHK016 Are stale-state and concurrency scenarios explicitly represented in requirement-level language, not only in task notes? [Coverage, Spec Edge Cases, Tasks T032]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK017 Are boundary navigation behaviors (first+previous, last+next) defined as explicit requirement outcomes? [Edge Case, Spec Edge Cases, Tasks T018]
- [x] CHK018 Is behavior for missing or unreadable slide artifacts defined with concrete response semantics and recovery expectations? [Edge Case, Spec Edge Cases, FR-010]
- [x] CHK019 Are adjacent endpoint edge assumptions (status/view when artifacts drift) explicitly documented or intentionally excluded? [Edge Case, Gap, Scope]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK020 Are security requirements complete for auth enforcement, payload sanitization, and sensitive-field exclusion in observability data? [NFR/Security, Spec FR-009, FR-011]
- [x] CHK021 Are observability requirements explicit about mandatory Rollbar capture fields (`requestId`, `errorCategory`, `severity`) and validation expectations? [NFR/Observability, Constitution VI, Tasks T033]
- [x] CHK022 Are determinism requirements explicit about stable ordering guarantees for unchanged snapshots? [NFR/Determinism, Spec FR-008, SC-003]
- [x] CHK023 Are performance requirements connected to release-gate validation conditions rather than best-effort guidance? [NFR/Performance, Plan Performance Goals, Tasks T034]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK024 Are dependencies on existing slide output artifacts and route-auth behavior documented as assumptions with failure impacts? [Dependency, Plan Technical Context, Assumption]
- [x] CHK025 Is the assumption of contract-first and test-first sequencing reflected consistently between constitution constraints and task order? [Dependency, Constitution I/III/IX, Tasks Phase 1-3]
- [x] CHK026 Are any assumptions about neighboring APIs (`status`/`view`) explicitly bounded to avoid unintended scope expansion? [Dependency, Boundary Exclusion, Gap]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK027 Are potentially ambiguous terms such as actionable error context, deterministic, and representative fixture operationally defined? [Ambiguity, Spec User Stories, Plan Performance Goals]
- [x] CHK028 Are there any requirement conflicts between security logging needs and sensitive-data exclusion rules? [Conflict Check, Spec FR-011, Constitution IV/VI]
- [x] CHK029 Is there any conflict between controller endpoint contract expectations and adjacent slide endpoint current behavior that should be resolved before implementation? [Conflict Check, Boundary Consistency, Gap]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
